ValidationRule.description: ITA : If case status is Pending - Internal, Pending - Customer or Pending - External then manual priority date is mandatory.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), RecordTypeId="012200000009CuR", OR( ISPICKVAL(Status,"Pending - Internal"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"Pending - Customer"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"Pending - External")), ISNULL(Manual_Priority_Date__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Manual priority date is required if case status is Pending - Internal, Pending - Customer or Pending - External.
